prompt: a beginner-friendly Star Picker player token
subject: a small round sky-blue explorer orb with a simple friendly face and subtle white rim light
style: clean stylized 2D game art, readable at small sizes
composition: centered single object, full object visible, square canvas
lighting: soft arcade glow, cheerful and calm
palette: sky blue, white highlights, small teal accent
constraints: transparent background, no text, no logo, no watermark, single sprite only, strong silhouette, readable at 40px
negative: complex limbs, weapons, photorealism, dark outlines that obscure the shape, clutter

prompt: a collectible star for Star Picker
subject: a five-point golden star with a soft warm glow and crisp edge
style: clean stylized 2D game art, readable at small sizes
composition: centered single object, full object visible, square canvas
lighting: bright reward pickup, friendly arcade shine
palette: golden yellow, pale cream highlights, subtle amber shadow
constraints: transparent background, no text, no logo, no watermark, single sprite only, strong silhouette, readable at 32px
negative: extra stars, particles separated from the main object, photorealism, harsh bloom, clutter

prompt: a simple Star Picker playfield background
scene: top-down night-sky arcade field with a subtle grid and calm depth
subject: unobtrusive playable arena backdrop, no characters or collectibles
composition: wide landscape frame, empty center and corners for gameplay readability
palette: deep teal and navy, very subtle cyan grid lines, faint warm specks
constraints: no text, no logo, no watermark, no player, no stars that could be confused with collectibles, keep contrast low behind gameplay objects
negative: clutter, high-frequency detail, bright focal objects, photorealism, harsh bloom
